examples: He just flied into rage at such a peccadillo!
For a time, the peccadillo reportedly cut in half her asking price for AD work.
In actual operation, there are so many factors which could influence the reliability of high-strength bolts that one peccadillo could endanger the safety of wind turbines.
The Tories are therefore now drawing attention to every little peccadillo that might embarrass the present government.
